title: racosperma websteri
intro: Racosperma websteri, also known as Acacia websteri, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a small to medium-sized shrub native to Australia, valued for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been reported to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Racosperma websteri can be prepared into herbal remedies, including tea, infusion, and extract, which can be used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
